(Teams) retrospective & reflection → What want well / bad, what should change / continue, what did we learn, ... 2) 20 min. (Teams) way forward → What is our long-term strategy, what will be success factors, what is crucial to initiate already now, ... 3) 45 min. (All) discussion → Let’s discuss and create our joint retrospective & way forward
